name: Ancestral Overbleed

name: Point-blank Barrage

name: Strength from Exile

name: Survivor of Strife

name: Heroes of Legend
community_notes: [APPROX] Detachment rule extending the Oath army rule: at the start of your turn, if your current Oath is fulfilled, determine an additional Oath (no repeated Deed/Quality; Qualities from fulfilled Oaths keep applying to Code Chivalric models; completing an additional Oath's Deed grants 1CP instead). This army-rule interaction is not expressible in the effect vocabulary and is modeled as an opaque ability grant. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Ram Jets
community_notes: Each time this model makes a Normal or Advance move, add D3" to its Move characteristic for that move.

name: Thundercharge
community_notes: While this model is equipped with both a thundershock spear and a bellatus reaper chainsword, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of its melee weapons.

name: Saturation Fire
community_notes: In the Shooting phase, each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

name: Ancestral Fortune

steps.choice_label: Change one roll made for this model to an unmodified 6

community_notes: [APPROX] Once per turn, spend 1YP to change one Hit roll, Wound roll or saving throw made for this model to an unmodified 6; the change applies to a single roll, not all rolls of that kind. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Luck Has. Need Keeps. Toil Earns.
Prioritised Efficiency
community_notes: Approximates Hostile Acquisition state: +1 to hit targeting enemy near objectives, reroll charge. Both yield-point states share +1 hit; objective proximity assumed met (hill-climbing mode).

name: Outflanking Armour
community_notes: [APPROX] Selects up to two friendly SAGITAUR units to make an ingress move; the requirements that they be in Strategic Reserves and that this be used at the end of the opponent's Movement phase from the second battle round onwards are not encoded. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Fury of the Hearth
community_notes: [APPROX] The +1 S on ranged attacks is unconditional; the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] grant is optional (only if you spend 1 YP). The resource-spend and keyword-grant steps together model that opt-in upgrade, but the sequence does not express that only the Sustained Hits step is gated on the YP spend. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Optimal Application
community_notes: [APPROX] YP gain is 1 per controlled objective outside your deployment zone with an IRON-MASTER/MEMNYR STRATEGIST model within range (max 2 YP/turn); the model-proximity, deployment-zone exclusion, and 2 YP cap are not encoded. The Shooting-phase effect (optionally spend 1 YP so a selected BRÔKHYR/IRONKIN STEELJACKS/ARKANYST EVALUATOR unit re-rolls Hit rolls of 1) has its unit gating simplified. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Ruthless Reinvestment
community_notes: [APPROX] At the start of the battle LEAGUES OF VOTANN units have the Hostile Acquisition ability; at the end of the Command phase you can spend 3 YP to swap the army between Hostile Acquisition and Fortify Takeover (the optional toggle is modeled as an opaque grant). The clause that units have neither ability except as described by this rule is not encoded. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Their Number is Legion
community_notes: Each time this unit's Reanimation Protocols activate, re-roll the dice determining how many wounds are reanimated.

name: Accelerator Mandible
community_notes: [APPROX] The selected friendly CANOPTEK unit must be within 3" of this unit; that 3" range is not encoded. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Necrodermis
community_notes: defensive: -1 to incoming damage (floored at 1 by the engine)

name: Tectonic Reverberations
community_notes: [APPROX] Selection is restricted to an enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model; that 18"/visibility restriction is not encoded, and the mark's until-your-next-Movement-phase window is modeled as one battle round. Pinned debuff (−2 Move, −2 to Charge rolls) mirrors the grav-pinned encoding. Full rule in raw-text store.

effect.choice_label: for each of up to 3 selected friendly NECRONS units

name: Hypermotility Protocols
community_notes: Applies to friendly IMMORTALS and NECRON WARRIORS units: their ranged attacks gain [ASSAULT], and advancing does not prevent the unit from starting an Action.

name: Transdimensional Deployment
community_notes: Applies to friendly TOMB BLADES units: they gain Deep Strike, and their ranged attacks get +1 to Hit in a turn they made an ingress (Deep Strike) move.

name: Empowered Engines
community_notes: Applies to friendly NECRONS TITANIC FLY units: +6" Move.

name: Recursive Reanimation
community_notes: TOMB BLADES enhancement: add 1 to the roll when the bearer's unit activates its Reanimation Protocols.

name: Subsurface Quantumweave
community_notes: [APPROX] Reactive defensive stratagem used when an enemy unit targets a friendly NECRONS TITANIC FLY unit in your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase: attacks that target your unit have Armour Penetration 1 until that enemy unit has finished attacking. Modeled as setting attacker AP to 1; the scoping to only the triggering enemy unit and the 'until it has attacked' window are not fully encoded. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Prelocational Optimiser

effect.choice_label: Ranged attacks gain (when selected to shoot)

community_notes: [APPROX] Applies only when the bearer's unit was set up this turn using a Monolith's Eternity Gate ability; when it is then selected to shoot, its ranged attacks gain either [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. The Eternity-Gate deployment precondition is not expressible in the condition set. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Technosorcerous Augmentations

steps.choice_label: Weapon ability chosen when the CRYPTEK unit is selected to shoot (until end of phase)

community_notes: Detachment rule: CRYPTEK ranged weapons gain [ASSAULT]; additionally, each time a CRYPTEK unit is selected to shoot, one listed weapon ability may be chosen for its ranged weapons until end of phase.

name: Relentless Onslaught
community_notes: [APPROX] +1 to Hit applies to NECRONS attacks (excluding MONSTER models) targeting a unit within range of an objective marker; the [ASSAULT] grant applies only to NECRONS VEHICLE and MOUNTED (excluding TITANIC) ranged weapons. Those keyword restrictions are not encoded. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Cold Fervour
community_notes: [APPROX] Step 1 (+2 Strength to DESTROYER CULT weapons) is always on. Step 2 fires the first time each turn a DESTROYER CULT unit destroys an enemy unit or brackets it below half-strength, granting +2 Strength to other friendly NECRONS weapons (excluding DESTROYER CULT/MONSTER/TITANIC) until end of turn; the kill trigger, the keyword exclusions, and the until-end-of-turn window are not encoded. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Annihilation Protocol
community_notes: [APPROX] Charge re-roll and the +1 Charge (when a charge target is Below Half-strength) apply to DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES units; the +1 Armour Penetration applies only to DESTROYER CULT ranged attacks that target the closest eligible target. The per-keyword scoping and the closest-target restriction are not encoded, and unit-below-half-strength approximates the target being below half. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Hyperphasing
community_notes: [APPROX] At the end of your opponent's turn, remove the selected NECRONS units to Strategic Reserves. The maximum selectable scales with battle size (Incursion 1 / Strike Force 2 / Onslaught 3) and is encoded at the Onslaught cap of 3; the end-of-opponent's-turn timing and the exclusion of units within Engagement Range are not encoded. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Cosmic Distortion
community_notes: [APPROX] Grants NECRONS MONSTER units the Distortion Fields aura: an enemy unit within 6" is 'unravelling', so attacks targeting it improve Armour Penetration by 1. The optional 3-mortal-wound extension of the aura to 9" and the model-specific C'tan binding abilities in the store text are not encoded. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Worthy Foes
community_notes: Detachment rule: in your Command phase mark one enemy unit; friendly NOBLE, LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH units add 1 to Wound rolls against it until the start of your next Command phase.

name: Kunnin’ Infiltrator
community_notes: [APPROX] Once per battle, in your Movement phase, instead of making a Normal move the unit is removed and set up again anywhere more than 9" from all enemy models; the instead-of-Normal-move cost and the 9" placement restriction are not encoded. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Mekaniak
community_notes: [APPROX] the hit bonus lasts until the start of your next Movement phase; each model can only be selected once per turn

name: Da Bigger Dey Are, da Better Dey Drop

name: Brutal Broadside

name: Targetin’ Gizmos
community_notes: [APPROX] Applies only while a BIG MEK model is embarked within the bearer WAGON unit; the embarked-within condition is not expressible, encoded as always active. Full rule in raw-text store.

community_notes: [APPROX] The disembarking ORKS INFANTRY unit must be embarked within the BATTLEWAGON, HUNTA RIG or KILL RIG model that was hit; the embarked-within linkage is not expressible. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Supercharged Squig Oil
community_notes: [APPROX] Fires only when the bearer uses its Mekaniak ability and applies to the VEHICLE model's unit selected by that ability; the ability-use linkage is not expressible, encoded as selecting one friendly VEHICLE unit. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Da Hunt Is On
community_notes: [APPROX] Prey selection is restricted to a MONSTER, VEHICLE or CHARACTER unit (the designate-target selector carries no keyword filter), and the charge re-roll applies only to charges that include the Prey as a target. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Try Dat Button!
community_notes: [APPROX] Random D6 table (1-2 Sustained Hits 1, 3-4 Lethal Hits, 5-6 improve AP by 2 on a Critical Wound) flattened to a choice; the AP option's Critical Wound-only rider, the [HAZARDOUS] rider for deliberately selecting an option, and the two-source Hazardous fail-on-1-or-2 escalation are dropped. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Da Boss Is Watchin’
community_notes: [APPROX] Second Waaagh! call requires one or more WARBOSS models on the battlefield (or embarked in an on-battlefield TRANSPORT) and a Command phase in a turn in which no Waaagh! was called; encoded as a once-per-battle grant of the Waaagh! ability to WARBOSS, NOBZ and MEGANOBZ units. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Mob Mentality
community_notes: [APPROX] Strongest case: the 5+ invulnerable save is the tier for BOYZ units containing 10 or more models; units below 10 models have a 6+ instead — no model-count condition exists. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Lissen ’Ere
community_notes: [APPROX] Issuers are limited to BOSS SNIKROT, MEK and WARBOSS models, once per battle round each (encoded as once-per-command-phase per model); the issuer's Leadership test (1 mortal wound to the receiving unit on a failure), the once-per-round-per-unit receipt limit and the Battle-shock exclusions are dropped. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Suppression Volley

name: DS8 Support Turret

name: Bodyguard

The attachment-capacity change is out of scope and unmodeled by design. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Autoreactive Camouflage
community_notes: [APPROX] When a hidden PATHFINDER TEAM or STEALTH BATTLESUITS unit is targeted in your opponent's Shooting phase, it gets +1 to its Save characteristic. The 'hidden' precondition is not gated here. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Flame-wreathed

name: Spirit Snare
community_notes: [APPROX] Opaque grant: when a friendly Cabal-of-Sorcerers Thousand Sons Psyker is destroyed within 9", a chosen bearer gains +1 to its Ritual Psychic test result for the battle (stacking to a maximum of +2); the trigger, stacking, and cap are not encoded. name: Flow of Magic
community_notes: [APPROX] Follows the Hallowed Ground terrain-area pattern: the enhanced in-Flow effect (+1 to the Wound roll for Psychic Attacks) is modeled as additive to the base reroll-1s rather than replacing it, and the deployment-zone/objective-majority zone tagging is approximated. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Strands of Time
community_notes: [APPROX] Encoded as the strongest case (shoot AND charge after Falling Back, the wholly-within-Flow-of-Magic outcome); the base case grants only one of the two, chosen when used. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Scouring Warpflame
community_notes: community-authored from 11e faction pack; targeting requires the unit be wholly within the Flow of Magic (modeled as a gating condition).

name: Warpfire Infusion

effect.choice_label: Re-roll one Hit, Wound, or Damage roll

community_notes: [APPROX] "Re-roll one Hit/Wound/Damage roll" is a single-die re-roll of choice, approximated here as re-rolling all failures. The clause improving a nearby VEHICLE's Deadly Demise to trigger on a 5+ is not encoded. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Warpmeld Sacrifice
community_notes: [APPROX] Restricted to TZEENTCH MUTANT INFANTRY/MOUNTED units. First option is the defensive sacrifice (-1 to enemy Wound rolls against it), second is the offensive sacrifice (+1 to its own Wound rolls); the D3 mortal-wound self-cost resolves at end of phase (timing not encoded). Full rule in raw-text store.

name: All is Dust
community_notes: [APPROX] Drops the "unmodified" qualifier on the Damage 1 gate, and "any armour saving throw" is modeled as a generic save modifier (invulnerable saves are not distinguished). Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Symbiotic Targeting
community_notes: [APPROX] After this model shoots, select one enemy unit hit by those attacks: until the end of the phase, friendly TYRANIDS models re-roll Hit rolls of 1 against it. The hit-by-this-model eligibility restriction is not encoded. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Aerial Seeding
community_notes: [APPROX] once set up on the battlefield no units can embark within it — the embark bar is not modeled

name: Bio-stimulus (Aura)
community_notes: [APPROX] After this model shoots, select one enemy unit hit by those attacks: until the end of the turn, friendly TYRANIDS melee attacks against it have their Armour Penetration improved by 1. The hit-by-this-model eligibility and the once-per-turn-per-enemy-unit limits are not encoded. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Tanglestrike Rounds
community_notes: After a NORN ASSIMILATOR unit shoots, one enemy unit it hit is tethered until the start of your next Command phase; while tethered, its Move characteristic is set to 2".

name: Surprise Assault
community_notes: [APPROX] TYRANIDS models re-roll Hit rolls of 1. BURROWER units arriving from Reserves place Tunnel Markers, and later Reserves can be set up near a Tunnel Marker; the marker placement/removal and near-marker deployment are captured as an opaque grant. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Hyper-adaptations
community_notes: [APPROX] At the start of the first battle round, pick one Hyper-adaptation for the battle: Swarming Instincts ([SUSTAINED HITS 1] vs INFANTRY/SWARM), Hyper-aggression ([LETHAL HITS] vs MONSTER/VEHICLE), or Hive Predators ([PRECISION] vs CHARACTER). The Hive Predators grant applies only on a Critical Hit, which is not gated here. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Feed the Swarm
community_notes: [APPROX] In your Command phase, each HARVESTER unit can Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit within 6": either heal D3+1 lost wounds on one model, or return one destroyed INFANTRY (non-CHARACTER) model at full wounds. ENDLESS MULTITUDE units return up to 3 models instead of 1 — the 3-model variant and per-HARVESTER selection are unmodeled. Full rule in raw-text store.

name: Serpentine Fiend
community_notes: [APPROX] This model can move through terrain features (but cannot end a move inside a wall/floor). The RUINS floor-level placement clause is unmodeled. Full rule in raw-text store.

community_notes: MONSTER and VEHICLE units cannot be suppressed.

name: Bloodied Terror
community_notes: [APPROX] the test subtracts 1 if the enemy unit is Below Half-strength

name: Frenzy
community_notes: Once per turn, per unit. In the Fight phase, after an enemy unit that targeted this unit resolves its attacks, this unit is eligible to fight again and must be selected to fight next.

name: Super-heavy War Engine
community_notes: [APPROX] it may move within Engagement Range of enemy models but cannot end the move there; after moving through terrain over 4" roll one D6 — on a 1 this model is Battle-shocked

name: The Scent of Blood
community_notes: In the Charge phase when this unit declares a charge: +1 to charge rolls if an enemy unit below starting strength is within 9", or +2 if an enemy unit below half strength is within 9". (Enemy-strength predicate carried on the option modifier; no dedicated condition type exists.)

effect.choice_label: Shoot at or charge the arriving unit

name: Bloody Stampede
community_notes: select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model when its unit ends a Charge move

name: Crush All Who Stand Before Us
Brazen Fury
community_notes: In your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model in this unit was destroyed, the unit can make a D6" Brazen Fury surge move.

name: Wrath of Khorne
community_notes: When a friendly WORLD EATERS CHARACTER (excluding EPIC HERO) is selected to fight, its CHARACTER models' melee attacks gain [CLEAVE 1] or +1 AP.

name: Blood Tithe
community_notes: Blood Tithe earn side: gain 1 BTP on a 3+ each time a Blood Legions or World Eaters unit destroys an enemy unit. The four spend options (start of Command phase, last until end of battle) are modeled as separate detachment abilities: enraged-abjuration (2 BTP), daemonic-rage (3 BTP), boon-of-blood (4 BTP), might-of-khorne (5 BTP).

name: Enraged Abjuration
community_notes: Blood Tithe spend (2 BTP), activated at the start of your Command phase, lasting until end of battle: Blood Legions and World Eaters models gain Feel No Pain 5+ against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds (modeled as FNP 5+ vs mortal wounds; the Psychic-Attacks scope is not separately expressible). Applies to the whole army, so no keyword gate.

name: Daemonic Rage
community_notes: Blood Tithe spend (3 BTP), activated at the start of your Command phase, lasting until end of battle: melee weapons equipped by Blood Legions units gain [LANCE].

name: Boon of Blood
community_notes: Blood Tithe spend (4 BTP), activated at the start of your Command phase, lasting until end of battle: Blood Legions units have a 4+ invulnerable save. Referenced by blessing-of-burning-blood as the 'Boon of Blood active' condition.

name: Might of Khorne
community_notes: Blood Tithe spend (5 BTP), activated at the start of your Command phase, lasting until end of battle: Blood Legions units gain the Blessings of Khorne ability.

name: Favoured of Khorne
community_notes: you can re-roll up to two of the D6 in each Blessings of Khorne roll while the bearer is on the battlefield

name: Butcher Lord
community_notes: [APPROX] may only be attached to a JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit

name: Disciple of Khorne
community_notes: [APPROX] may only be attached to a BLOODCRUSHERS or FLESH HOUNDS unit; the BLOOD LEGIONS Faction keyword replaces WORLD EATERS while leading

name: Archslaughterer
community_notes: WORLD EATERS model only. Once per battle, per army, in your Command phase: every Blessing of Khorne is active for this unit until the start of your next turn.

name: Gateways to Glory
community_notes: WORLD EATERS DAEMON PRINCE model only: the model gains MOBILE and +1 to charge rolls.

name: Frenzied Resilience
community_notes: reactive: used just after an enemy unit selects your unit as a target in the Fight phase

name: Blood Offering
community_notes: the objective marker remains yours until your opponent's Level of Control over it exceeds yours at the end of a phase; usable even though the unit was just destroyed

name: Skulls for the Skull Throne!
community_notes: used just after your unit destroys a CHARACTER or MONSTER model; the extra Blessing is active in addition to any currently active Blessings

name: Berzerker's Wrath
community_notes: replaces the D6 surge-move roll: models move up to 8" instead

name: In the Shadow of Brass Idols
community_notes: [APPROX] the 5+ also applies within 9" of a friendly WORLD EATERS TITANIC unit; usable in your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit selects your JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit as a target

name: Aggressive Disembarkation
community_notes: A unit embarked in the Rhino disembarks and is set up wholly within 6" of it (extending the default 3"), and may be set up within Engagement Range of enemies. Stratagem: target a World Eaters Rhino that has not been selected to move this phase (the stationary-transport precondition is not expressible in the DSL target vocabulary).

name: Unrelenting Advance
community_notes: cannot be combined with the Fury Unleashed Stratagem in the same phase

name: Fury Unleashed
community_notes: [APPROX] used just after an enemy unit shoots a WORLD EATERS RHINO with wounds remaining: one embarked KHORNE BERZERKERS unit makes the disembark move then the surge move; cannot be combined with Unrelenting Advance in the same phase

name: Blessing of Burning Blood
community_notes: 5+ invulnerable save until end of phase, improving to 4+ while the Boon of Blood ability (Blood Tithe, Khorne Daemonkin) is active. The source targets a Blood Legions unit within 6" of the attacked World Eaters unit but buffs that World Eaters unit; the DSL target vocabulary can't express that relay, so target is the unit the ability resolves on.

name: Summoned by Slaughter
community_notes: Set up a Bloodletters unit from Reserves wholly within 9" of the destroyed model and more than 6" from enemy units, once per battle round. Modeled with resurrection — the local blood-legions summon pattern (cf. daemontide); the Reserves origin, 9"/>6" placement, and once-per-battle-round limit are recorded here rather than in the effect shape.

name: Murder-call
community_notes: the unit must be on the battlefield and not within Engagement Range of enemy units

name: Daemonic Strength
community_notes: [APPROX] EIGHTBOUND get the bonus against targets that are not MONSTERS or VEHICLES; EXALTED EIGHTBOUND get it against MONSTERS and VEHICLES instead

name: Daemonic Resistance
community_notes: Defensive: each time an attack targets the unit, subtract 1 from the attacker's Wound roll (modeled attacker-side, as icon-of-obstinacy / rugged-resilience do). Reactive stratagem, used just after an enemy selects targets in the opponent's Shooting or Fight phase.

name: Immortal Fury
community_notes: used just after an enemy unit selects your unit as a target; only models that have not fought this phase fight after the attacking unit finishes its attacks

name: Warp Stalkers
community_notes: applies to Normal, Advance, Fall Back and Charge moves; a Charge move may end within Engagement Range; usable in your Movement or Charge phase

name: Punish the Craven
community_notes: An enemy unit engaged with your WORLD EATERS CHARACTER that falls back must use desperate escape; if it is battle-shocked, -1 to those hazard rolls.

name: Rampaging Terrors
community_notes: Grants friendly DAEMON VEHICLE units the Terror of Khorne ability: at the start of the Fight phase, force a battle-shock test at -1 on one engaged enemy unit (once per enemy per phase). ONSLAUGHT detachment.

name: Talons of Butchery
community_notes: MAULERFIEND unit only. This unit's Maulerfiend Fists have [CLEAVE 2].

name: Murder-Forged Entity
community_notes: WORLD EATERS VEHICLE model only: the unit gains the DAEMON keyword.

name: Goaded to Fury
community_notes: When an enemy unit that targeted a friendly unengaged DAEMON VEHICLE (excluding TITANIC) has shot, that unit can make a surge move of up to D6".

name: Adamantine Avalanche
community_notes: At the start of the Fight phase, if a friendly TERMINATOR SQUAD is engaged, make a Blessings of Khorne roll and activate one Blessing of Khorne for friendly TERMINATOR SQUAD units (in addition to any already active).

name: Gore-Stained Veterans
